verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Ngun peengkul nih bawl in. Tuate na bawl ciangin na seek ding a, mihonte khopna ding leh giahphual nusiatna dingin na zang ding hi
A nihin a kitum ciangin kikhopna bukkong nangma kiangah mihon khempeuh hong kikhawm ding uh hi
Ahih hangin khat bek a kitum leh Israel minamte' lutang ahi makaite nangma kiangah hong kikhawm ding uh hi
Din'khiatna ding zaksakna na tum ciangin nisuahna lampanga giahphual-ate dingkhia masa ding uh hi
A nih veina na tum ciangin leitaw lampanga giahphual-ate dingkhia ding hi. Amaute a din'khiat ding peuhmah ciangun zaksakna kitum ding hi
Mihonte a kikaihkhop ding ciangin na tum ding a, ahih hangin a gin'dan na kibangsak kei ding hi
Aaron' tapa siampite in peengkulte tum ding uh hi. Peengkul zatna pen na khang tawntungun note-a' dingin a kip den ngeina khat hi ding hi

Na gamsung uhah, no hong nengniam na galte uh tawh na kido ding uh ciangin, Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah note hong kiphawkna dingin peengkulte tawh pataukohna aw na gingsak ding uh a, na langte panun note hong kihon ding hi

Na lungdam hun uh, a kiseh na pawi hunte uh, leh kha kipat hunte-in, note in na meihal biaknate uh leh thunuama na biakpiaknate uhah zong peengkulte na tum ding uh hi. Tuate pen na Pasian uh mai-ah phawkna-in kimang ding hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi.
A kum nihna, a kha nihna, a ni sawmnih ni-in thuciamna biakbuk tung san panin meii kilakhia to a
Sinai sehnel gam panin Israel mite phual khat pan phual khatah dingkhia uh a, Paran gamlakah meii a khawl hi
Moses' tung tawnin Topa' thupiakna tawh khualzin cilna kipan uh hi
Judah mite' giahphual diakhai a neite a pawpawlin dingkhia masa uh hi. Tua mihonte, Amminadab' tapa Nahshon in uk hi
Issakhar minam honte, Zuar' tapa Nethanel in uk hi
Zebulun minam honte, Helon' tapa Eliab in uk hi
Biakbuk a kiphel khit ciangin, biakbuk a pua Gershon mite leh Merari mite dingkhia uh hi
A zomah Reuben' giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin dingkhia uh hi. Tua mihonte, Shedeur' tapa Elizur in uk hi
Simeon minam honpite, Zurishaddai' tapa Shelumiel in uk hi
Gad minam honpite, Deuel' tapa Eliasaf in uk hi
Tua ciangin a siangtho nate pua-in Kohath mite dingkhia uh a, amaute a tun' ma-in biakbuk na kidingsak khin hi
A zomah Efraim mite' giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin dingkhia uh hi. Tua mihonte, Ammihud' tapa Elishama in uk hi
Manasseh minam honte, Pedahzur' tapa Gamaliel in uk hi
Benjamin minam honte, Gideoni tapa Abidan in uk hi
Tua ciangin adang khempeuh' nungdalin Dan mite' giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin dingkhia uh hi. Tua mihonte, Ammishaddai' tapa Ahiezer in uk hi
Asher minam honte, Okran' tapa Pagiel in uk hi
Naftali minam honte, Enan' tapa Ahira in uk hi
Hih pen Israel mite a din'khiat uh ciangin amau' mihonte tawh kizui-in a paina zia uh ahi hi

Moses in ama zi' sanggampa ahi, Midian mi Reuel' tapa Hobab kiangah, “ Topa in, ‘Note' tungah kong pia ding hi,’ a cihna mun zuanin a dingkhia ding ka hi uh hi. Ko hong zui in; nang kong limbawl ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Israel-te hong limbawl ding hong ciam hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin amah in, “Kong zui kei ding hi. Ka leitang leh ka behte kiangah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi
Moses in, “Kote hong nusia kei in, kong thum hi; nangmah in gamlakah giahphual satna ding zia thei na hih manin, kote-a' dingin lamhilh nong hi ding hi
Kote hong zui lecin, Topa in kote hong limbawl ding bangbangin nang zong kong limbawl ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa' mual panin amaute dingkhia-in ni thum lam a pai uh hi. A tawlngakna ding mun uh a zon'sak dingin Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang, amau' mai ni thum lam na pai khol hi
Giahphual panin a din'khiat peuhmah uh ciangin sunin amaute' tungah Topa' meii a om hi
Singkuang a din'khiat peuhmah ciangin Moses in, “ Topa aw, dingin na galte kithehthang sak in la, nang hong mudahte na mai-ah taisak in,” a ci hi
A khawl ciangin, “ Topa aw, Israel tul sawm tampite' kiangah hong ciahkik in,” a ci hi.
